scenario: Solidus work session - audit the Order contract before a teardown rework

steps.name: Map the Order contract and what it is built on
Trace how an order is built and recalculated
Audit every dependent of the Order contract
Trace how order state and completeness are guarded
Assess the blast radius of the contract change
